entry.name: fileList
entry.label: URLs of files currently on the shelf

entry.name: hoverWidth
entry.label: Width in pixels of the panel hover/drop area; 0 means icon size

entry.name: edgeOpen
entry.label: Open the shelf when a drag touches a screen edge strip

entry.name: edgeOpenEdge
entry.label: Which screen edge hosts the drag-open strip: left/right/top/bottom

entry.name: cacheDir
entry.label: Base directory for temporary files (a "file-shelf" subfolder is created inside it); empty means ~/.cache
